title: "INSERT INTO tbl SELECT * FROM tbl2" statement may modify data if ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN has been used on tbl2.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a Int32, b String DEFAULT 'default_value');
CREATE TABLE t2(a Int32, b String);
INSERT INTO t2 SELECT a, b FROM t1;
key_bug_features: INSERT INTO tbl SELECT * FROM tbl2 after ALTER TABLE
